database.title: MongoDB Database
database.description: MongoDB database name where scraped documents will be uploaded.

collection.title: MongoDB Collection
collection.description: MongoDB collection name where scraped documents will be uploaded.

vector_path.title: Vector Path
vector_path.description: Document field path used to store the embedding vector.

embed_model.title: Embedding Model
embed_model.description: Embedding model used to vectorize scraped chunks.

dimensions.title: Embedding Dimensions
dimensions.description: Embedding vector dimension count expected by the vector search index.

urls.title: URLs
urls.description: Web pages to scrape and upload into MongoDB.
